name_romaji: Sekizō Yakushi Nyorai zazō, isseki Amida sanzon zō (Ogushi)
name_en: Stone Seated Yakushi Nyorai Statue and Single-Stone Amida Triad Statue (Ogushi)
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of stone Buddhist statues. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City. It is located at Jishōji temple in Ogushi, Yoshii-machi.

name_romaji: Isseki Kannon sanzon ryūzō, sekizō Yakushi Nyorai ryūzō (Iwasaki)
name_en: Single-Stone Standing Kannon Triad and Stone Standing Yakushi Nyorai Statue (Iwasaki)
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of stone Buddhist statues. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City. It is held in a private collection.
A tangible cultural property, a stone seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City. It is held in a private collection.

name_en: Seated Statues of Datsueba and Ken'eo (Ōsawa)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, seated stone statues. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City. It is held in a private collection.

name_en: Group of Three Stone Buddhas of the Yakushi Hall (Maniwa)
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of three stone Buddhist statues. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: Sekizō Yakushi Nyorai zazō to sekiden (Ōsawa)
name_en: Stone Seated Yakushi Nyorai Statue and Stone Shrine (Ōsawa)
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of a stone seated Yakushi Nyorai statue and a stone shrine. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 1993-06-23. It is held in a private collection.

A tangible cultural property, a Kannon hall. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 1995-05-24. It is located at Jōgyōin temple in Nagane, Yoshii-machi.

A tangible cultural property, a stone pillar lantern (sekidō). It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 1998-10-27. It is held in a private collection.

A tangible cultural property, a shrine structure. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2004-11-19. It is located at Karashina Shrine in Yoshii, Yoshii-machi.

name_en: Treasures of Shinkōji Temple, Inariyama Shōtenin
description_en: A tangible cultural property, temple treasures. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2005-02-18. It is located at Shinkōji temple in Iwai, Yoshii-machi.

A tangible cultural property, a historical diary. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2010-04-20. It is held by Takasaki City at the Municipal Central Library.

name_romaji: Takasaki Jōhō Danchi 2 iseki shutsudohin: hisui (kōgyoku) sei taishu 1, asabachi-gata doki 2
name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Takasaki Joho Danchi No. 2 Site: One Jade (Nephrite) Large Bead and Two Shallow-Bowl Vessels
description_en: A tangible cultural property, archaeological artifacts excavated from a site. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2010-04-20. It is held by Takasaki City at the Kannonzuka Archaeological Museum.

name_en: Documents of the Kojima Family Relating to the Goman-goku Uprising
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a collection of historical documents. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2010-04-20. It is held in a private collection.
A tangible cultural property, a historical banner. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2010-04-20. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: Kōzuke no kuni Tago-gun shōsō ato shutsudohin
name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Government Granary Site of Tago District, Kozuke Province
description_en: A tangible cultural property, archaeological artifacts excavated from a granary site. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2020-11-20. It is held by Takasaki City at the Tago-hi Memorial Museum.

description_en: A tangible cultural property, archaeological artifacts excavated from a grave site. It is municipally designated as an Important Cultural Property of Takasaki City, designated on 2020-11-20. It is located in Takasaki City.
